# hooks-objects-insert-node-at-path

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for insertNodeAtPath

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useInsertNodeAtPathMutation(); mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useInsertNodeAtPathMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useInsertNodeAtPathMutation();
mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```
